'''''Darkk''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the year [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==History==
Virtually nothing is known about this ship's service history. The only thing known about it is the fact that it accompanied the Star Destroyer ''[[Indiko]]'' in order to collect [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] after he thwarted [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s assassination attempt on Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] while he was riding on his personal luxury liner. This occurred mere weeks before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
